code:
import io
import string

fn has_content(_ s: String) -> Bool
  not string.is_empty(string.trim(s))
end

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)
mut found = false
mut last = ""
mut current = ""
mut i = 0
while i < n
  match string.byte_at(input, i)
  when Some(v)
    if v == 10
      if has_content(current)
        last = current
        found = true
      end
      current = ""
    else
      current = "#{current}#{string.from_byte(v)}"
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if has_content(current)
  last = current
  found = true
end

if found
  println(last)
else
  println("(none)")
end
